title: "MAGEL2_multiomics_analysis"
author: "Michael Eibl, Jannis Buecking, Baran Enes Gueler"
output: html_document
---

1.1 Loading all libraries

```{r}
library("DESeq2")
library("stringr")
library("ggplot2")
library("ggpubr")
library("dplyr")
library("patchwork")
library("org.Hs.eg.db")
library("annotate")
library("AnnotationHub")
library('EnhancedVolcano')
library("gridExtra")
library("grid")
library("clusterProfiler")
library("eulerr")
library("ComplexHeatmap")
library("openxlsx")
library("Homo.sapiens")
library("tidyverse")
library("gprofiler2")
library("UpSetR")
library("ComplexUpset")
library("TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene")
library("biomaRt")
library("AnnotationDbi")
library("org.Hs.eg.db")
library("tidyr")
library("GO.db")
library("simplifyEnrichment")
library("VennDiagram")
library("STRINGdb")
library("igraph")
library("GOSemSim")
library("cluster")
library("Matrix")
library("RColorBrewer") 
library("pheatmap")
library("forcats")
library("readr")
library("msigdbr")
library("readxl")
library("openxlsx")
```

1.2 Color scheme for 7 genotypes

```{r}
#color scheme for 7 genotypes (n=7)
gg_color_hue <- function(n) {
  hues = seq(15, 375, length = n + 1)
  hcl(h = hues, l = 65, c = 100)[1:n]
}

#relevant function for subsetting vectors
`%notin%` <- Negate(`%in%`)

#load relevant databases
txdb <- TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene
```

1.3 Load the pre-processed RNA-seq and proteomics datasets.

```{r}
#RNA-seq
dds_RNA <- readRDS(file = "./dds_RNA_30102024.rds")
DEG_list_MGH <- readRDS(file = "./DEG_list_MGH_30102024.rds")
DEG_list_8330 <- readRDS(file = "./DEG_list_8330_30102024.rds")

#proteomics
data_imp_MGH_new <- readRDS(file = "./data_imp_MGH_BH_new.rds")
dep_MGH_results_new <- readRDS(file = "./dep_MGH_BH_new.rds")

data_imp_8330_new <- readRDS(file = "./data_imp_8330_BH_new.rds")
dep_8330_results_new <- readRDS(file = "./dep_8330_BH_new.rds")

#ubiquitinomics
Ubi_data_imp_MGH_new <- readRDS(file = "./Ubi_data_imp_MGH_BH_new.rds")
dep_ubi_MGH_new_results <- readRDS(file = "Ubi_dep_MGH_BH_new.rds")

Ubi_data_imp_8330_new <- readRDS(file = "./Ubi_data_imp_8330_BH_new.rds")
dep_ubi_8330_new_results <- readRDS(file = "Ubi_dep_8330_BH_new.rds")
```

2.1 Prepare lists of DEGs/DEPs and significantly enriched GO-terms for the respective comparisons of overlap analysis - MGH-RNA

```{r}
list_MGH_RNA_up <- list()
for (comp in names(DEG_list_MGH)) {

  # Extract significant results
  signif_genes <- DEG_list_MGH[[comp]][DEG_list_MGH[[comp]][, "padj"] < 0.05 &
                                       !is.na(DEG_list_MGH[[comp]][, "padj"]) &
                                         DEG_list_MGH[[comp]][, "log2FoldChange"] > 0, ] %>%
    rownames()

  list_MGH_RNA_up[[comp]] <- signif_genes
}

list_MGH_RNA_down <- list()
for (comp in names(DEG_list_MGH)) {

  # Extract significant results
  signif_genes <- DEG_list_MGH[[comp]][DEG_list_MGH[[comp]][, "padj"] < 0.05 &
                                       !is.na(DEG_list_MGH[[comp]][, "padj"]) &
                                         DEG_list_MGH[[comp]][, "log2FoldChange"] < 0, ] %>%
    rownames()

  list_MGH_RNA_down[[comp]] <- signif_genes
}

comp_names <- c("RNA_DelC_up", "RNA_DupC_up", "RNA_HetDel_up", "RNA_HomoDel_up", "RNA_PWSTI_up", "RNA_PWSTII_up")
names(list_MGH_RNA_up) <- c("RNA_DelC_up", "RNA_DupC_up", "RNA_HetDel_up", "RNA_HomoDel_up", "RNA_PWSTI_up", "RNA_PWSTII_up")
names(list_MGH_RNA_down) <- c("RNA_DelC_down", "RNA_DupC_down", "RNA_HetDel_down", "RNA_HomoDel_down", "RNA_PWSTI_down", "RNA_PWSTII_down")
```

2.2 Prepare lists of DEGs/DEPs and significantly enriched GO-terms for the respective comparisons of overlap analysis - MGH-Protein

```{r}
dep_MGH_results_new <- rowData(dep_MGH_results_new)

comparisons_DEP <- c("DelC_vs_WT", "DupC_vs_WT", "HetDel_vs_WT", "HomoDel_vs_WT", "PWSTI_vs_WT", "PWSTII_vs_WT")
list_MGH_Protein_up <- list()
for (comp in comparisons_DEP) {

  # Extract significant results
  signif_genes <- dep_MGH_results_new$name[which(dep_MGH_results_new[,paste0(comp, "_p.adj")] < 0.05 &
                                               dep_MGH_results_new[,paste0(comp, "_diff")] > 0)]

  list_MGH_Protein_up[[comp]] <- signif_genes
}

list_MGH_Protein_down <- list()
for (comp in comparisons_DEP) {

  # Extract significant results
  signif_genes <- dep_MGH_results_new$name[which(dep_MGH_results_new[,paste0(comp, "_p.adj")] < 0.05 &
                                               dep_MGH_results_new[,paste0(comp, "_diff")] < 0)]

  list_MGH_Protein_down[[comp]] <- signif_genes
}

names(list_MGH_Protein_up) <- c("Protein_DelC_up", "Protein_DupC_up", "Protein_HetDel_up", "Protein_HomoDel_up", "Protein_PWSTI_up", "Protein_PWSTII_up")
names(list_MGH_Protein_down) <- c("Protein_DelC_down", "Protein_DupC_down", "Protein_HetDel_down", "Protein_HomoDel_down", "Protein_PWSTI_down", "Protein_PWSTII_down")
```


2.5 Prepare lists of DEGs/DEPs and significantly enriched GO-terms for the respective comparisons of overlap analysis - MGH-Ubi

```{r}
dep_ubi_MGH_new_results <- rowData(dep_ubi_MGH_new_results)
comparisons_deu <- c("DelC_vs_WT", "DupC_vs_WT", "HetDel_vs_WT", "HomoDel_vs_WT", "PWSTI_vs_WT", "PWSTII_vs_WT")
list_MGH_new_Ubi_up <- list()
for (comp in comparisons_deu) {
  
  # Extract significant results
  signif_genes <- dep_ubi_MGH_new_results$name[which(dep_ubi_MGH_new_results[,paste0(comp, "_p.adj")] < 0.1 &
                                               dep_ubi_MGH_new_results[,paste0(comp, "_diff")] > 0)]
  
  list_MGH_new_Ubi_up[[comp]] <- signif_genes
}

list_MGH_new_Ubi_down <- list()
for (comp in comparisons_deu) {
  
  # Extract significant results
  signif_genes <- dep_ubi_MGH_new_results$name[which(dep_ubi_MGH_new_results[,paste0(comp, "_p.adj")] < 0.1 &
                                               dep_ubi_MGH_new_results[,paste0(comp, "_diff")] < 0)]
  
  list_MGH_new_Ubi_down[[comp]] <- signif_genes
}

names(list_MGH_new_Ubi_up) <- c("Protein_DelC_up", "Protein_DupC_up", "Protein_HetDel_up", "Protein_HomoDel_up", "Protein_PWSTI_up", "Protein_PWSTII_up")
names(list_MGH_new_Ubi_down) <- c("Protein_DelC_down", "Protein_DupC_down", "Protein_HetDel_down", "Protein_HomoDel_down", "Protein_PWSTI_down", "Protein_PWSTII_down")
```

```{r}
dep_ubi_8330_new_results <- rowData(dep_ubi_8330_new_results)

comparisons_deu <- c("DelC_vs_WT", "DupC_vs_WT", "HomoDel_vs_WT", "PWSTI_vs_WT", "PWSTII_vs_WT")
list_8330_new_Ubi_up <- list()
for (comp in comparisons_deu) {
  
  # Extract significant results

                                               dep_ubi_8330_new_results[,paste0(comp, "_diff")] > 0)]

}

```

3.1 Preparing GO lists - 8330 RNA

```{r}
### 8330

GO_list_8330_RNA_up <- list()
for (comp in names(DEG_list_8330)) {

  # Extract significant results
  signif_genes <- DEG_list_8330[[comp]][DEG_list_8330[[comp]][, "padj"] < 0.05 &
                                       !is.na(DEG_list_8330[[comp]][, "padj"]) &
                                         DEG_list_8330[[comp]][, "log2FoldChange"] > 0, ] %>%
    rownames()

  #Symbol to EntrezID
  signif_genes <- bitr(signif_genes, fromType="SYMBOL", toType="ENTREZID", OrgDb="org.Hs.eg.db")

  ego <- enrichGO(gene = signif_genes$ENTREZID,
                keyType = "ENTREZID",
                OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                ont = c("all"),
                pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                qvalueCutoff = 0.05,
                readable = TRUE)

  GO_list_8330_RNA_up[[comp]] <- ego
}

GO_list_8330_RNA_down <- list()
for (comp in names(DEG_list_8330)) {

  # Extract significant results
  signif_genes <- DEG_list_8330[[comp]][DEG_list_8330[[comp]][, "padj"] < 0.05 &
                                       !is.na(DEG_list_8330[[comp]][, "padj"]) &
                                         DEG_list_8330[[comp]][, "log2FoldChange"] < 0, ] %>%
    rownames()

  #Symbol to EntrezID
  signif_genes <- bitr(signif_genes, fromType="SYMBOL", toType="ENTREZID", OrgDb="org.Hs.eg.db")

  ego <- enrichGO(gene = signif_genes$ENTREZID,
                keyType = "ENTREZID",
                OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                ont = "all",
                pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                qvalueCutoff = 0.05,
                readable = TRUE)

  GO_list_8330_RNA_down[[comp]] <- ego
}


names(GO_list_8330_RNA_up) <- c("RNA_DelC_up", "RNA_DupC_up", "RNA_HetDel_up", "RNA_HomoDel_up", "RNA_PWSTI_up", "RNA_PWSTII_up")
names(GO_list_8330_RNA_down) <- c("RNA_DelC_down", "RNA_DupC_down", "RNA_HetDel_down", "RNA_HomoDel_down", "RNA_PWSTI_down", "RNA_PWSTII_down")

GO_list_8330_RNA_down$RNA_DelC_down@result

```

3.2 Preparing GO lists - MGH RNA

```{r}
#MGH background GO terms
GO_list_MGH_RNA_up <- list()
for (comp in names(DEG_list_MGH)) {


  # Extract significant results
  signif_genes <- DEG_list_MGH[[comp]][DEG_list_MGH[[comp]][, "padj"] < 0.05 &
                                       !is.na(DEG_list_MGH[[comp]][, "padj"]) &
                                         DEG_list_MGH[[comp]][, "log2FoldChange"] > 0, ] %>%
    rownames()

  #Symbol to EntrezID
  signif_genes <- bitr(signif_genes, fromType="SYMBOL", toType="ENTREZID", OrgDb="org.Hs.eg.db")

  ego <- enrichGO(gene = signif_genes$ENTREZID,
                keyType = "ENTREZID",
                OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                ont = "all",
                pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                qvalueCutoff = 0.05,
                readable = TRUE)

  GO_list_MGH_RNA_up[[comp]] <- ego
}
GO_list_MGH_RNA_down <- list()
for (comp in names(DEG_list_MGH)) {


  # Extract significant results
  signif_genes <- DEG_list_MGH[[comp]][DEG_list_MGH[[comp]][, "padj"] < 0.05 &
                                       !is.na(DEG_list_MGH[[comp]][, "padj"]) &
                                         DEG_list_MGH[[comp]][, "log2FoldChange"] < 0, ] %>%
    rownames()

  #Symbol to EntrezID
  signif_genes <- bitr(signif_genes, fromType="SYMBOL", toType="ENTREZID", OrgDb="org.Hs.eg.db")

  ego <- enrichGO(gene = signif_genes$ENTREZID,
                keyType = "ENTREZID",
                OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                ont = "all",
                pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                qvalueCutoff = 0.05,
                readable = TRUE)

  GO_list_MGH_RNA_down[[comp]] <- ego
}
comp_names <- c("RNA_DelC_up", "RNA_DupC_up", "RNA_HetDel_up", "RNA_HomoDel_up", "RNA_PWSTI_up", "RNA_PWSTII_up")
names(GO_list_MGH_RNA_up) <- c("RNA_DelC_up", "RNA_DupC_up", "RNA_HetDel_up", "RNA_HomoDel_up", "RNA_PWSTI_up", "RNA_PWSTII_up")
names(GO_list_MGH_RNA_down) <- c("RNA_DelC_down", "RNA_DupC_down", "RNA_HetDel_down", "RNA_HomoDel_down", "RNA_PWSTI_down", "RNA_PWSTII_down")
```

3.3 Preparing GO lists - MGH Protein

```{r}
comparisons_DEP <- c("DelC_vs_WT", "DupC_vs_WT", "HetDel_vs_WT", "HomoDel_vs_WT", "PWSTI_vs_WT", "PWSTII_vs_WT")

GO_list_MGH_Protein_up <- list()
for (comp in comparisons_DEP) {


  # Extract significant results
  signif_genes <- dep_MGH_results_new$name[which(dep_MGH_results_new[,paste0(comp, "_p.adj")] < 0.05 &
                                               dep_MGH_results_new[,paste0(comp, "_diff")] > 0)]

  #Symbol to EntrezID
  signif_genes <- bitr(signif_genes, fromType="SYMBOL", toType="ENTREZID", OrgDb="org.Hs.eg.db")

  ego <- enrichGO(gene = signif_genes$ENTREZID,
                keyType = "ENTREZID",
                OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                ont = "all",
                pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                qvalueCutoff = 0.05,
                readable = TRUE)

  GO_list_MGH_Protein_up[[comp]] <- ego
}
GO_list_MGH_Protein_down <- list()
for (comp in comparisons_DEP) {


  # Extract significant results
  signif_genes <- dep_MGH_results_new$name[which(dep_MGH_results_new[,paste0(comp, "_p.adj")] < 0.05 &
                                               dep_MGH_results_new[,paste0(comp, "_diff")] < 0)]

  #Symbol to EntrezID
  signif_genes <- bitr(signif_genes, fromType="SYMBOL", toType="ENTREZID", OrgDb="org.Hs.eg.db")

  ego <- enrichGO(gene = signif_genes$ENTREZID,
                keyType = "ENTREZID",
                OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                ont = "all",
                pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                qvalueCutoff = 0.05,
                readable = TRUE)

  GO_list_MGH_Protein_down[[comp]] <- ego
}
names(GO_list_MGH_Protein_up) <- c("Protein_DelC_up", "Protein_DupC_up", "Protein_HetDel_up", "Protein_HomoDel_up", "Protein_PWSTI_up", "Protein_PWSTII_up")
names(GO_list_MGH_Protein_down) <- c("Protein_DelC_down", "Protein_DupC_down", "Protein_HetDel_down", "Protein_HomoDel_down", "Protein_PWSTI_down", "Protein_PWSTII_down")
```

3.5 Preparing GO lists - MGH Ubi

```{r}
# Note: dep_ubi_MGH_new_results is already a DFrame/data.frame from section 2.5

comparisons_DEU <- c("DelC_vs_WT", "DupC_vs_WT", "HetDel_vs_WT", "HomoDel_vs_WT", "PWSTI_vs_WT", "PWSTII_vs_WT")

GO_list_MGH_Ubi_up <- list()
for (comp in comparisons_DEU) {

  # Extract significant results - USE OBJECT DIRECTLY
  signif_genes <- dep_ubi_MGH_new_results$name[which(dep_ubi_MGH_new_results[, paste0(comp, "_p.adj")] < 0.1 &
                                                            dep_ubi_MGH_new_results[, paste0(comp, "_diff")] > 0)]

  # Symbol to EntrezID
  signif_genes <- bitr(signif_genes, fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db")

  ego <- enrichGO(gene = signif_genes$ENTREZID,
                  keyType = "ENTREZID",
                  OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                  ont = "all",
                  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                  qvalueCutoff = 0.05,
                  readable = TRUE)

  GO_list_MGH_Ubi_up[[comp]] <- ego
}

###

comparisons_DEU <- c("DelC_vs_WT", "DupC_vs_WT", "HetDel_vs_WT", "HomoDel_vs_WT", "PWSTI_vs_WT", "PWSTII_vs_WT")

GO_list_MGH_Ubi_down <- list()
for (comp in comparisons_DEU) {


  # Extract significant results - USE OBJECT DIRECTLY
  signif_genes <- dep_ubi_MGH_new_results$name[which(dep_ubi_MGH_new_results[, paste0(comp, "_p.adj")] < 0.1 &
                                                            dep_ubi_MGH_new_results[, paste0(comp, "_diff")] < 0)]

  # Symbol to EntrezID
  signif_genes <- bitr(signif_genes, fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db")

  ego <- enrichGO(gene = signif_genes$ENTREZID,
                  keyType = "ENTREZID",
                  OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                  ont = "all",
                  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                  qvalueCutoff = 0.05,
                  readable = TRUE)

  GO_list_MGH_Ubi_down[[comp]] <- ego
}


names(GO_list_MGH_Ubi_up) <- c("Protein_DelC_up", "Protein_DupC_up", "Protein_HetDel_up", "Protein_HomoDel_up", "Protein_PWSTI_up", "Protein_PWSTII_up")
names(GO_list_MGH_Ubi_down) <- c("Protein_DelC_down", "Protein_DupC_down", "Protein_HetDel_down", "Protein_HomoDel_down", "Protein_PWSTI_down", "Protein_PWSTII_down")
```

3.6 Preparing GO lists - 8330 Ubi

```{r}
# Note: dep_ubi_8330_new_results is already a DFrame/data.frame from section 2.6

comparisons_DEU <- c("DelC_vs_WT", "DupC_vs_WT", "HomoDel_vs_WT", "PWSTI_vs_WT", "PWSTII_vs_WT")

GO_list_8330_Ubi_up <- list()
for (comp in comparisons_DEU) {


  # Extract significant results - USE OBJECT DIRECTLY
  signif_genes <- dep_ubi_8330_new_results$name[which(dep_ubi_8330_new_results[, paste0(comp, "_p.adj")] < 0.1 &
                                                            dep_ubi_8330_new_results[, paste0(comp, "_diff")] > 0)]

  # Symbol to EntrezID
  signif_genes <- bitr(signif_genes, fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db")

  ego <- enrichGO(gene = signif_genes$ENTREZID,
                  keyType = "ENTREZID",
                  OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                  ont = "all",
                  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                  qvalueCutoff = 0.05,
                  readable = TRUE)

  GO_list_8330_Ubi_up[[comp]] <- ego
}

###

comparisons_DEU <- c("DelC_vs_WT", "DupC_vs_WT", "HomoDel_vs_WT", "PWSTI_vs_WT", "PWSTII_vs_WT")

GO_list_8330_Ubi_down <- list()
for (comp in comparisons_DEU) {

  # Extract significant results - USE OBJECT DIRECTLY
  signif_genes <- dep_ubi_8330_new_results$name[which(dep_ubi_8330_new_results[, paste0(comp, "_p.adj")] < 0.1 &
                                                            dep_ubi_8330_new_results[, paste0(comp, "_diff")] < 0)]

  # Symbol to EntrezID
  signif_genes <- bitr(signif_genes, fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db")

  ego <- enrichGO(gene = signif_genes$ENTREZID,
                  keyType = "ENTREZID",
                  OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                  ont = "all",
                  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                  qvalueCutoff = 0.05,
                  readable = TRUE)

  GO_list_8330_Ubi_down[[comp]] <- ego
}


names(GO_list_8330_Ubi_up) <- c("Protein_DelC_up", "Protein_DupC_up", "Protein_HomoDel_up", "Protein_PWSTI_up", "Protein_PWSTII_up")
names(GO_list_8330_Ubi_down) <- c("Protein_DelC_down", "Protein_DupC_down", "Protein_HomoDel_down", "Protein_PWSTI_down", "Protein_PWSTII_down")

```

4.1 Number of DEGs, DEPs & DEUs without background overlap

```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 4.1 Number of DEGs, DEPs & DEUs (Robust & Venn-Consistent)
# ==============================================================================

# --- Step 1: Define Constants ---
plot_labels <- c(
  "DelC Down", "DelC Up",
  "DupC Down", "DupC Up",
  "HetDel Down", "HetDel Up",
  "HomoDel Down", "HomoDel Up",
  "PWSTI Down", "PWSTI Up",
  "PWSTII Down", "PWSTII Up"
)

plot_regulation <- rep(c("Down", "Up"), 6)

# --- Step 2: Exact-Match Helper Function ---
get_venn_safe_counts <- function(down_list, up_list) {
  
  # The genotypes to search for
  target_genos <- c("DelC", "DupC", "HetDel", "HomoDel", "PWSTI", "PWSTII")
  final_counts <- c()
  
  for (geno in target_genos) {
    # We use a more specific regex:
    # 1. ^ or _ ensures we catch the genotype name at the start or after a separator
    # 2. _ after ensures we don't catch PWSTII when looking for PWSTI
    down_pattern <- paste0("(^|_)", geno, "(_|$)")
    
    # Search names for the indices
    idx_down_all <- grep(down_pattern, names(down_list), ignore.case = TRUE)
    idx_up_all   <- grep(down_pattern, names(up_list),   ignore.case = TRUE)
    
    # Further filter these indices to ensure they match the direction
    idx_down <- idx_down_all[grep("down", names(down_list)[idx_down_all], ignore.case = TRUE)]
    idx_up   <- idx_up_all[grep("up",     names(up_list)[idx_up_all],     ignore.case = TRUE)]
    
    # Extract unique Down counts
    if (length(idx_down) > 0) {
      val_down <- length(unique(na.omit(down_list[[idx_down[1]]])))
    } else {
      val_down <- 0 
    }
    
    # Extract unique Up counts
    if (length(idx_up) > 0) {
      val_up <- length(unique(na.omit(up_list[[idx_up[1]]])))
    } else {
      val_up <- 0
    }
    
    final_counts <- c(final_counts, val_down, val_up)
  }
  
  return(data.frame(
    Count = final_counts,
    Condition = factor(plot_labels, levels = plot_labels),
    Regulation = plot_regulation
  ))
}

# --- Step 3: Generate Data Frames ---
df_mgh_deg  <- get_venn_safe_counts(list_MGH_RNA_down, list_MGH_RNA_up)
df_8330_deg <- get_venn_safe_counts(list_8330_RNA_down, list_8330_RNA_up)
df_mgh_dep  <- get_venn_safe_counts(list_MGH_Protein_down, list_MGH_Protein_up)
df_8330_dep <- get_venn_safe_counts(list_8330_Protein_down, list_8330_Protein_up)
df_mgh_deu  <- get_venn_safe_counts(list_MGH_new_Ubi_down, list_MGH_new_Ubi_up)
df_8330_deu <- get_venn_safe_counts(list_8330_new_Ubi_down, list_8330_new_Ubi_up)

# --- Step 4: Re-Run Plotting ---
p1 <- create_de_plot(df_mgh_deg, "MGH Differentially Expressed Genes (DEGs)")
p2 <- create_de_plot(df_8330_deg, "8330 Differentially Expressed Genes (DEGs)")
p3 <- create_de_plot(df_mgh_dep, "MGH Differentially Expressed Proteins (DEPs)")
p4 <- create_de_plot(df_8330_dep, "8330 Differentially Expressed Proteins (DEPs)")
p5 <- create_de_plot(df_mgh_deu, "MGH Differentially Expressed Ubiquitinated Proteins (DEUs)")
p6 <- create_de_plot(df_8330_deu, "8330 Differentially Expressed Ubiquitinated Proteins (DEUs)")

print(p1); print(p2); print(p3); print(p4); print(p5); print(p6)
```

4.2 Number of GO enrichment terms from DEGs, DEPs & DEUs without background overlap

```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 4.2 Number of GO enrichment terms (Robust & Exact Match)
# ==============================================================================

# --- Step 1: Robust Helper Function for GO Terms ---
# This matches by name (e.g., "HetDel") using regex to prevent PWSTI/II confusion.
get_go_safe_counts <- function(go_down_list, go_up_list) {
  
  target_genos <- c("DelC", "DupC", "HetDel", "HomoDel", "PWSTI", "PWSTII")
  final_counts <- c()
  
  for (geno in target_genos) {
    # Specific regex: (^|_) ensures name starts or follows a separator
    # (_|$) ensures name ends or is followed by a separator
    pattern <- paste0("(^|_)", geno, "(_|$)")
    
    # 1. Extract Down Count
    idx_down_matches <- grep(pattern, names(go_down_list), ignore.case = TRUE)
    # Ensure we pick the specific 'down' slot among matches
    idx_down <- idx_down_matches[grep("down", names(go_down_list)[idx_down_matches], ignore.case = TRUE)]
    
    if (length(idx_down) > 0) {
      val_down <- length(go_down_list[[idx_down[1]]])
    } else {
      val_down <- 0 
    }
    
    # 2. Extract Up Count
    idx_up_matches <- grep(pattern, names(go_up_list), ignore.case = TRUE)
    # Ensure we pick the specific 'up' slot among matches
    idx_up <- idx_up_matches[grep("up", names(go_up_list)[idx_up_matches], ignore.case = TRUE)]
    
    if (length(idx_up) > 0) {
      val_up <- length(go_up_list[[idx_up[1]]])
    } else {
      val_up <- 0
    }
    
    final_counts <- c(final_counts, val_down, val_up)
  }
  
  return(data.frame(
    Count = final_counts,
    Condition = factor(plot_labels, levels = plot_labels),
    Regulation = plot_regulation
  ))
}

# --- Step 2: Generate Data Frames for GO Terms ---

# RNA GO Terms
df_mgh_go_rna  <- get_go_safe_counts(GO_list_MGH_RNA_down_terms, GO_list_MGH_RNA_up_terms)
df_8330_go_rna <- get_go_safe_counts(GO_list_8330_RNA_down_terms, GO_list_8330_RNA_up_terms)

# Protein GO Terms
df_mgh_go_prot  <- get_go_safe_counts(GO_list_MGH_Protein_down_terms, GO_list_MGH_Protein_up_terms)
df_8330_go_prot <- get_go_safe_counts(GO_list_8330_Protein_down_terms, GO_list_8330_Protein_up_terms)

# Ubiquitin GO Terms
df_mgh_go_ubi  <- get_go_safe_counts(GO_list_MGH_Ubi_down_terms, GO_list_MGH_Ubi_up_terms)
df_8330_go_ubi <- get_go_safe_counts(GO_list_8330_Ubi_down_terms, GO_list_8330_Ubi_up_terms)

# --- Step 3: Generate and Print Plots ---

p7  <- create_de_plot(df_mgh_go_rna,  "MGH GO Terms (RNA)")
p8  <- create_de_plot(df_8330_go_rna, "8330 GO Terms (RNA)")
p9  <- create_de_plot(df_mgh_go_prot, "MGH GO Terms (Protein)")
p10 <- create_de_plot(df_8330_go_prot, "8330 GO Terms (Protein)")
p11 <- create_de_plot(df_mgh_go_ubi,  "MGH GO Terms (Ubiquitin)")
p12 <- create_de_plot(df_8330_go_ubi, "8330 GO Terms (Ubiquitin)")

print("--- Printing GO Term Count Plots ---")
print(p7); print(p8); print(p9); print(p10); print(p11); print(p12)
```

4.3 Background overlap of GO enrichment terms from DEGs, DEPs & DEUs

```{r}
# --- Section A: RNA GO Terms Overlap ---

# 1. Combine Up and Down GO terms for each condition
list_MGH_RNA_GO_Combined <- list(
  DelC    = union(GO_list_MGH_RNA_up_terms$RNA_DelC_up,    GO_list_MGH_RNA_down_terms$RNA_DelC_down),
  DupC    = union(GO_list_MGH_RNA_up_terms$RNA_DupC_up,    GO_list_MGH_RNA_down_terms$RNA_DupC_down),
  HetDel  = union(GO_list_MGH_RNA_up_terms$RNA_HetDel_up,  GO_list_MGH_RNA_down_terms$RNA_HetDel_down),
  HomoDel = union(GO_list_MGH_RNA_up_terms$RNA_HomoDel_up, GO_list_MGH_RNA_down_terms$RNA_HomoDel_down),
  PWSTI   = union(GO_list_MGH_RNA_up_terms$RNA_PWSTI_up,   GO_list_MGH_RNA_down_terms$RNA_PWSTI_down),
  PWSTII  = union(GO_list_MGH_RNA_up_terms$RNA_PWSTII_up,  GO_list_MGH_RNA_down_terms$RNA_PWSTII_down)
)

list_8330_RNA_GO_Combined <- list(
  DelC    = union(GO_list_8330_RNA_up_terms$RNA_DelC_up,    GO_list_8330_RNA_down_terms$RNA_DelC_down),
  DupC    = union(GO_list_8330_RNA_up_terms$RNA_DupC_up,    GO_list_8330_RNA_down_terms$RNA_DupC_down),
  HetDel  = union(GO_list_8330_RNA_up_terms$RNA_HetDel_up,  GO_list_8330_RNA_down_terms$RNA_HetDel_down),
  HomoDel = union(GO_list_8330_RNA_up_terms$RNA_HomoDel_up, GO_list_8330_RNA_down_terms$RNA_HomoDel_down),
  PWSTI   = union(GO_list_8330_RNA_up_terms$RNA_PWSTI_up,   GO_list_8330_RNA_down_terms$RNA_PWSTI_down),
  PWSTII  = union(GO_list_8330_RNA_up_terms$RNA_PWSTII_up,  GO_list_8330_RNA_down_terms$RNA_PWSTII_down)
)

# 2. Visualize overlaps (Venn Diagrams)
print("Plotting RNA GO Term Overlaps...")
grid.arrange(
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_RNA_GO_Combined$DelC,    "8330" = list_8330_RNA_GO_Combined$DelC)),    quantities = TRUE, main = "DelC"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_RNA_GO_Combined$DupC,    "8330" = list_8330_RNA_GO_Combined$DupC)),    quantities = TRUE, main = "DupC"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_RNA_GO_Combined$HetDel,  "8330" = list_8330_RNA_GO_Combined$HetDel)),  quantities = TRUE, main = "HetDel"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_RNA_GO_Combined$HomoDel, "8330" = list_8330_RNA_GO_Combined$HomoDel)), quantities = TRUE, main = "HomoDel"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_RNA_GO_Combined$PWSTI,   "8330" = list_8330_RNA_GO_Combined$PWSTI)),   quantities = TRUE, main = "PWSTI"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_RNA_GO_Combined$PWSTII,  "8330" = list_8330_RNA_GO_Combined$PWSTII)),  quantities = TRUE, main = "PWSTII"),
  nrow=2, top = "Overlap of Enriched GO Terms: RNA (MGH vs 8330)"
)

# 3. Calculate intersections
list_RNA_GO_overlap <- list(
  DelC    = intersect(list_MGH_RNA_GO_Combined$DelC,    list_8330_RNA_GO_Combined$DelC),
  DupC    = intersect(list_MGH_RNA_GO_Combined$DupC,    list_8330_RNA_GO_Combined$DupC),
  HetDel  = intersect(list_MGH_RNA_GO_Combined$HetDel,  list_8330_RNA_GO_Combined$HetDel),
  HomoDel = intersect(list_MGH_RNA_GO_Combined$HomoDel, list_8330_RNA_GO_Combined$HomoDel),
  PWSTI   = intersect(list_MGH_RNA_GO_Combined$PWSTI,   list_8330_RNA_GO_Combined$PWSTI),
  PWSTII  = intersect(list_MGH_RNA_GO_Combined$PWSTII,  list_8330_RNA_GO_Combined$PWSTII)
)
print("Number of overlapping RNA GO Terms:")
print(lapply(list_RNA_GO_overlap, length))

grid.arrange(
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_Ubi_GO_Combined$DelC,    "8330" = list_8330_Ubi_GO_Combined$DelC)),    quantities = TRUE, main = "DelC"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_Ubi_GO_Combined$DupC,    "8330" = list_8330_Ubi_GO_Combined$DupC)),    quantities = TRUE, main = "DupC"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_Ubi_GO_Combined$HetDel,  "8330" = list_8330_Ubi_GO_Combined$HetDel)),  quantities = TRUE, main = "HetDel"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_Ubi_GO_Combined$HomoDel, "8330" = list_8330_Ubi_GO_Combined$HomoDel)), quantities = TRUE, main = "HomoDel"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_Ubi_GO_Combined$PWSTI,   "8330" = list_8330_Ubi_GO_Combined$PWSTI)),   quantities = TRUE, main = "PWSTI"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_Ubi_GO_Combined$PWSTII,  "8330" = list_8330_Ubi_GO_Combined$PWSTII)),  quantities = TRUE, main = "PWSTII"),
  nrow=2, top = "Overlap of Enriched GO Terms: Ubiquitin (MGH vs 8330)"
)


# 3. Calculate intersections
list_Ubi_GO_overlap <- list(
  DelC    = intersect(list_MGH_Ubi_GO_Combined$DelC,    list_8330_Ubi_GO_Combined$DelC),
  DupC    = intersect(list_MGH_Ubi_GO_Combined$DupC,    list_8330_Ubi_GO_Combined$DupC),
  HetDel  = intersect(list_MGH_Ubi_GO_Combined$HetDel,  list_8330_Ubi_GO_Combined$HetDel),
  HomoDel = intersect(list_MGH_Ubi_GO_Combined$HomoDel, list_8330_Ubi_GO_Combined$HomoDel),
  PWSTI   = intersect(list_MGH_Ubi_GO_Combined$PWSTI,   list_8330_Ubi_GO_Combined$PWSTI),
  PWSTII  = intersect(list_MGH_Ubi_GO_Combined$PWSTII,  list_8330_Ubi_GO_Combined$PWSTII)
)
print("Number of overlapping Ubiquitin GO Terms:")
print(lapply(list_Ubi_GO_overlap, length))
```

4.3.1 Venn diagram overlap but keeping up- and downregulated terms separate

```{r}
library(eulerr)
library(gridExtra)

# ==============================================================================
# --- Helper Function for Styling ---
# ==============================================================================
# This function applies the specific colors and removes borders automatically.
# Colors: MGH Unique (#ECECEC), 8330 Unique (#B8B8B8), Overlap (#D9D9D9)

plot_custom_venn <- function(set_mgh, set_8330, plot_title) {
  
  # Fit the Euler diagram
  fit <- euler(list("MGH" = set_mgh, "8330" = set_8330))
  
  # Plot with specific styles
  # fills order: 1=MGH Unique, 2=8330 Unique, 3=Intersection
  plot(fit,
       quantities = TRUE,
       main = plot_title,
       fills = c("#ECECEC", "#B8B8B8", "#D9D9D9"), 
       edges = FALSE)
}

# ==============================================================================
# --- Section A: RNA GO Terms (Separated Up/Down) ---
# ==============================================================================

# ---------------- A1. Visualize RNA UP Overlaps ----------------
print("Plotting RNA UP-regulated GO Term Overlaps...")
grid.arrange(
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_RNA_up_terms$RNA_DelC_up,    GO_list_8330_RNA_up_terms$RNA_DelC_up,    "DelC (Up)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_RNA_up_terms$RNA_DupC_up,    GO_list_8330_RNA_up_terms$RNA_DupC_up,    "DupC (Up)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_RNA_up_terms$RNA_HetDel_up,  GO_list_8330_RNA_up_terms$RNA_HetDel_up,  "HetDel (Up)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_RNA_up_terms$RNA_HomoDel_up, GO_list_8330_RNA_up_terms$RNA_HomoDel_up, "HomoDel (Up)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_RNA_up_terms$RNA_PWSTI_up,   GO_list_8330_RNA_up_terms$RNA_PWSTI_up,   "PWSTI (Up)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_RNA_up_terms$RNA_PWSTII_up,  GO_list_8330_RNA_up_terms$RNA_PWSTII_up,  "PWSTII (Up)"),
  nrow=2, top = "Overlap of UP-regulated GO Terms: RNA (MGH vs 8330)"
)

# ---------------- A2. Visualize RNA DOWN Overlaps ----------------
print("Plotting RNA DOWN-regulated GO Term Overlaps...")
grid.arrange(
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_RNA_down_terms$RNA_DelC_down,    GO_list_8330_RNA_down_terms$RNA_DelC_down,    "DelC (Down)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_RNA_down_terms$RNA_DupC_down,    GO_list_8330_RNA_down_terms$RNA_DupC_down,    "DupC (Down)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_RNA_down_terms$RNA_HetDel_down,  GO_list_8330_RNA_down_terms$RNA_HetDel_down,  "HetDel (Down)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_RNA_down_terms$RNA_HomoDel_down, GO_list_8330_RNA_down_terms$RNA_HomoDel_down, "HomoDel (Down)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_RNA_down_terms$RNA_PWSTI_down,   GO_list_8330_RNA_down_terms$RNA_PWSTI_down,   "PWSTI (Down)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_RNA_down_terms$RNA_PWSTII_down,  GO_list_8330_RNA_down_terms$RNA_PWSTII_down,  "PWSTII (Down)"),
  nrow=2, top = "Overlap of DOWN-regulated GO Terms: RNA (MGH vs 8330)"
)


# ==============================================================================
# --- Section B: Protein GO Terms (Separated Up/Down) ---
# ==============================================================================

# ---------------- B1. Visualize Protein UP Overlaps ----------------
print("Plotting Protein UP-regulated GO Term Overlaps...")
grid.arrange(
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Protein_up_terms$Protein_DelC_up,    GO_list_8330_Protein_up_terms$Protein_DelC_up,    "DelC (Up)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Protein_up_terms$Protein_DupC_up,    GO_list_8330_Protein_up_terms$Protein_DupC_up,    "DupC (Up)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Protein_up_terms$Protein_HetDel_up,  GO_list_8330_Protein_up_terms$Protein_HetDel_up,  "HetDel (Up)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Protein_up_terms$Protein_HomoDel_up, GO_list_8330_Protein_up_terms$Protein_HomoDel_up, "HomoDel (Up)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Protein_up_terms$Protein_PWSTI_up,   GO_list_8330_Protein_up_terms$Protein_PWSTI_up,   "PWSTI (Up)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Protein_up_terms$Protein_PWSTII_up,  GO_list_8330_Protein_up_terms$Protein_PWSTII_up,  "PWSTII (Up)"),
  nrow=2, top = "Overlap of UP-regulated GO Terms: Protein (MGH vs 8330)"
)

# ---------------- B2. Visualize Protein DOWN Overlaps ----------------
print("Plotting Protein DOWN-regulated GO Term Overlaps...")
grid.arrange(
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Protein_down_terms$Protein_DelC_down,    GO_list_8330_Protein_down_terms$Protein_DelC_down,    "DelC (Down)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Protein_down_terms$Protein_DupC_down,    GO_list_8330_Protein_down_terms$Protein_DupC_down,    "DupC (Down)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Protein_down_terms$Protein_HetDel_down,  GO_list_8330_Protein_down_terms$Protein_HetDel_down,  "HetDel (Down)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Protein_down_terms$Protein_HomoDel_down, GO_list_8330_Protein_down_terms$Protein_HomoDel_down, "HomoDel (Down)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Protein_down_terms$Protein_PWSTI_down,   GO_list_8330_Protein_down_terms$Protein_PWSTI_down,   "PWSTI (Down)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Protein_down_terms$Protein_PWSTII_down,  GO_list_8330_Protein_down_terms$Protein_PWSTII_down,  "PWSTII (Down)"),
  nrow=2, top = "Overlap of DOWN-regulated GO Terms: Protein (MGH vs 8330)"
)


# ==============================================================================
# --- Section C: Ubiquitin GO Terms (Separated Up/Down) ---
# ==============================================================================

# ---------------- C1. Visualize Ubiquitin UP Overlaps ----------------
print("Plotting Ubiquitin UP-regulated GO Term Overlaps...")
grid.arrange(
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Ubi_up_terms$Protein_DelC_up,    GO_list_8330_Ubi_up_terms$Protein_DelC_up,    "DelC (Up)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Ubi_up_terms$Protein_DupC_up,    GO_list_8330_Ubi_up_terms$Protein_DupC_up,    "DupC (Up)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Ubi_up_terms$Protein_HetDel_up,  GO_list_8330_Ubi_up_terms$Protein_HetDel_up,  "HetDel (Up)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Ubi_up_terms$Protein_HomoDel_up, GO_list_8330_Ubi_up_terms$Protein_HomoDel_up, "HomoDel (Up)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Ubi_up_terms$Protein_PWSTI_up,   GO_list_8330_Ubi_up_terms$Protein_PWSTI_up,   "PWSTI (Up)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Ubi_up_terms$Protein_PWSTII_up,  GO_list_8330_Ubi_up_terms$Protein_PWSTII_up,  "PWSTII (Up)"),
  nrow=2, top = "Overlap of UP-regulated GO Terms: Ubiquitin (MGH vs 8330)"
)

# ---------------- C2. Visualize Ubiquitin DOWN Overlaps ----------------
print("Plotting Ubiquitin DOWN-regulated GO Term Overlaps...")
grid.arrange(
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Ubi_down_terms$Protein_DelC_down,    GO_list_8330_Ubi_down_terms$Protein_DelC_down,    "DelC (Down)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Ubi_down_terms$Protein_DupC_down,    GO_list_8330_Ubi_down_terms$Protein_DupC_down,    "DupC (Down)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Ubi_down_terms$Protein_HetDel_down,  GO_list_8330_Ubi_down_terms$Protein_HetDel_down,  "HetDel (Down)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Ubi_down_terms$Protein_HomoDel_down, GO_list_8330_Ubi_down_terms$Protein_HomoDel_down, "HomoDel (Down)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Ubi_down_terms$Protein_PWSTI_down,   GO_list_8330_Ubi_down_terms$Protein_PWSTI_down,   "PWSTI (Down)"),
  plot_custom_venn(GO_list_MGH_Ubi_down_terms$Protein_PWSTII_down,  GO_list_8330_Ubi_down_terms$Protein_PWSTII_down,  "PWSTII (Down)"),
  nrow=2, top = "Overlap of DOWN-regulated GO Terms: Ubiquitin (MGH vs 8330)"
)
```

4.4 Overlap between backgrounds visualized as venn diagrams (Down- and Upregulated combined)

```{r}
# --- Part 1: Differentially Expressed Genes (DEGs) ---

# Step 1.1: Combine Up- and Down-regulated gene lists for each background and condition

# For MGH background
list_MGH_RNA_DE <- list(
  DelC     = union(list_MGH_RNA_up$RNA_DelC_up,     list_MGH_RNA_down$RNA_DelC_down),
  DupC     = union(list_MGH_RNA_up$RNA_DupC_up,     list_MGH_RNA_down$RNA_DupC_down),
  HetDel   = union(list_MGH_RNA_up$RNA_HetDel_up,   list_MGH_RNA_down$RNA_HetDel_down),
  HomoDel  = union(list_MGH_RNA_up$RNA_HomoDel_up,  list_MGH_RNA_down$RNA_HomoDel_down),
  PWSTI    = union(list_MGH_RNA_up$RNA_PWSTI_up,    list_MGH_RNA_down$RNA_PWSTI_down),
  PWSTII   = union(list_MGH_RNA_up$RNA_PWSTII_up,   list_MGH_RNA_down$RNA_PWSTII_down)
)

# For 8330 background
list_8330_RNA_DE <- list(
  DelC     = union(list_8330_RNA_up$RNA_DelC_up,     list_8330_RNA_down$RNA_DelC_down),
  DupC     = union(list_8330_RNA_up$RNA_DupC_up,     list_8330_RNA_down$RNA_DupC_down),
  HetDel   = union(list_8330_RNA_up$RNA_HetDel_up,   list_8330_RNA_down$RNA_HetDel_down),
  HomoDel  = union(list_8330_RNA_up$RNA_HomoDel_up,  list_8330_RNA_down$RNA_HomoDel_down),
  PWSTI    = union(list_8330_RNA_up$RNA_PWSTI_up,    list_8330_RNA_down$RNA_PWSTI_down),
  PWSTII   = union(list_8330_RNA_up$RNA_PWSTII_up,   list_8330_RNA_down$RNA_PWSTII_down)
)

# Step 1.2: Visualize overlaps of combined DEGs across the two backgrounds as Venn diagrams
print("Venn diagrams for overall Differentially Expressed Genes (DEGs) overlap:")
grid.arrange(
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_RNA_DE$DelC,    "8330" = list_8330_RNA_DE$DelC)), quantities = TRUE, main = "DelC"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_RNA_DE$DupC,    "8330" = list_8330_RNA_DE$DupC)), quantities = TRUE, main = "DupC"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_RNA_DE$HetDel,  "8330" = list_8330_RNA_DE$HetDel)), quantities = TRUE, main = "HetDel"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_RNA_DE$HomoDel, "8330" = list_8330_RNA_DE$HomoDel)), quantities = TRUE, main = "HomoDel"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_RNA_DE$PWSTI,   "8330" = list_8330_RNA_DE$PWSTI)), quantities = TRUE, main = "PWSTI"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_RNA_DE$PWSTII,  "8330" = list_8330_RNA_DE$PWSTII)), quantities = TRUE, main = "PWSTII"),
  nrow=2,
  top = "Overlap of all Differentially Expressed Genes (MGH vs 8330)"
)

# Step 1.3: Calculate and store the list of overlapping DEGs
list_RNA_DE_overlap <- list(
  "overlap_DEG_DelC"    = intersect(list_MGH_RNA_DE$DelC,    list_8330_RNA_DE$DelC),
  "overlap_DEG_DupC"    = intersect(list_MGH_RNA_DE$DupC,    list_8330_RNA_DE$DupC),
  "overlap_DEG_HetDel"  = intersect(list_MGH_RNA_DE$HetDel,  list_8330_RNA_DE$HetDel),
  "overlap_DEG_HomoDel" = intersect(list_MGH_RNA_DE$HomoDel, list_8330_RNA_DE$HomoDel),
  "overlap_DEG_PWSTI"   = intersect(list_MGH_RNA_DE$PWSTI,   list_8330_RNA_DE$PWSTI),
  "overlap_DEG_PWSTII"  = intersect(list_MGH_RNA_DE$PWSTII,  list_8330_RNA_DE$PWSTII)
)

# Step 1.4: Count the number of overlapping DEGs for each condition
print("Number of overlapping DEGs for each condition:")
print(lapply(list_RNA_DE_overlap, length))


# --- Part 2: Differentially Expressed Proteins (DEPs) ---

# Step 2.1: Combine Up- and Down-regulated protein lists for each background and condition

# For MGH background
list_MGH_Protein_DE <- list(
  DelC     = union(list_MGH_Protein_up$Protein_DelC_up,     list_MGH_Protein_down$Protein_DelC_down),
  DupC     = union(list_MGH_Protein_up$Protein_DupC_up,     list_MGH_Protein_down$Protein_DupC_down),
  HetDel   = union(list_MGH_Protein_up$Protein_HetDel_up,   list_MGH_Protein_down$Protein_HetDel_down),
  HomoDel  = union(list_MGH_Protein_up$Protein_HomoDel_up,  list_MGH_Protein_down$Protein_HomoDel_down),
  PWSTI    = union(list_MGH_Protein_up$Protein_PWSTI_up,    list_MGH_Protein_down$Protein_PWSTI_down),
  PWSTII   = union(list_MGH_Protein_up$Protein_PWSTII_up,   list_MGH_Protein_down$Protein_PWSTII_down)
)

# For 8330 background
list_8330_Protein_DE <- list(
  DelC     = union(list_8330_Protein_up$Protein_DelC_up,     list_8330_Protein_down$Protein_DelC_down),
  DupC     = union(list_8330_Protein_up$Protein_DupC_up,     list_8330_Protein_down$Protein_DupC_down),
  HetDel   = union(list_8330_Protein_up$Protein_HetDel_up,   list_8330_Protein_down$Protein_HetDel_down),
  HomoDel  = union(list_8330_Protein_up$Protein_HomoDel_up,  list_8330_Protein_down$Protein_HomoDel_down),
  PWSTI    = union(list_8330_Protein_up$Protein_PWSTI_up,    list_8330_Protein_down$Protein_PWSTI_down),
  PWSTII   = union(list_8330_Protein_up$Protein_PWSTII_up,   list_8330_Protein_down$Protein_PWSTII_down)
)

# Step 2.2: Visualize overlaps of combined DEPs across the two backgrounds as Venn diagrams
print("Venn diagrams for overall Differentially Expressed Proteins (DEPs) overlap:")
grid.arrange(
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_Protein_DE$DelC,    "8330" = list_8330_Protein_DE$DelC)), quantities = TRUE, main = "DelC"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_Protein_DE$DupC,    "8330" = list_8330_Protein_DE$DupC)), quantities = TRUE, main = "DupC"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_Protein_DE$HetDel,  "8330" = list_8330_Protein_DE$HetDel)), quantities = TRUE, main = "HetDel"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_Protein_DE$HomoDel, "8330" = list_8330_Protein_DE$HomoDel)), quantities = TRUE, main = "HomoDel"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_Protein_DE$PWSTI,   "8330" = list_8330_Protein_DE$PWSTI)), quantities = TRUE, main = "PWSTI"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_Protein_DE$PWSTII,  "8330" = list_8330_Protein_DE$PWSTII)), quantities = TRUE, main = "PWSTII"),
  nrow=2,
  top = "Overlap of all Differentially Expressed Proteins (MGH vs 8330)"
)

# Step 2.3: Calculate and store the list of overlapping DEPs
list_Protein_DE_overlap <- list(
  "overlap_DEP_DelC"    = intersect(list_MGH_Protein_DE$DelC,    list_8330_Protein_DE$DelC),
  "overlap_DEP_DupC"    = intersect(list_MGH_Protein_DE$DupC,    list_8330_Protein_DE$DupC),
  "overlap_DEP_HetDel"  = intersect(list_MGH_Protein_DE$HetDel,  list_8330_Protein_DE$HetDel),
  "overlap_DEP_HomoDel" = intersect(list_MGH_Protein_DE$HomoDel, list_8330_Protein_DE$HomoDel),
  "overlap_DEP_PWSTI"   = intersect(list_MGH_Protein_DE$PWSTI,   list_8330_Protein_DE$PWSTI),
  "overlap_DEP_PWSTII"  = intersect(list_MGH_Protein_DE$PWSTII,  list_8330_Protein_DE$PWSTII)
)

# Step 2.4: Count the number of overlapping DEPs for each condition
print("Number of overlapping DEPs for each condition:")
print(lapply(list_Protein_DE_overlap, length))




# --- Part 3: Differentially Expressed Ubiquitinated Proteins (DEUs) ---

# Step 2.1: Combine Up- and Down-regulated DEU lists for each background and condition

# For MGH background
list_MGH_Ubi_DE <- list(
  DelC     = union(list_MGH_new_Ubi_up$Protein_DelC_up,
list_MGH_new_Ubi_down$Protein_DelC_down),
  DupC     = union(list_MGH_new_Ubi_up$Protein_DupC_up,     list_MGH_new_Ubi_down$Protein_DupC_down),
  HetDel   = union(list_MGH_new_Ubi_up$Protein_HetDel_up,   list_MGH_new_Ubi_down$Protein_HetDel_down),
  HomoDel  = union(list_MGH_new_Ubi_up$Protein_HomoDel_up,  list_MGH_new_Ubi_down$Protein_HomoDel_down),
  PWSTI    = union(list_MGH_new_Ubi_up$Protein_PWSTI_up,    list_MGH_new_Ubi_down$Protein_PWSTI_down),
  PWSTII   = union(list_MGH_new_Ubi_up$Protein_PWSTII_up,   list_MGH_new_Ubi_down$Protein_PWSTII_down)
)

# For 8330 background
list_8330_Ubi_DE <- list(
  DelC     = union(list_8330_new_Ubi_up$Protein_DelC_up,     list_8330_new_Ubi_down$Protein_DelC_down),
  DupC     = union(list_8330_new_Ubi_up$Protein_DupC_up,     list_8330_new_Ubi_down$Protein_DupC_down),
  HetDel   = union(list_8330_new_Ubi_up$Protein_HetDel_up,   list_8330_new_Ubi_down$Protein_HetDel_down),
  HomoDel  = union(list_8330_new_Ubi_up$Protein_HomoDel_up,  list_8330_new_Ubi_down$Protein_HomoDel_down),
  PWSTI    = union(list_8330_new_Ubi_up$Protein_PWSTI_up,    list_8330_new_Ubi_down$Protein_PWSTI_down),
  PWSTII   = union(list_8330_new_Ubi_up$Protein_PWSTII_up,   list_8330_new_Ubi_down$Protein_PWSTII_down)
)

# Step 2.2: Visualize overlaps of combined DEPs across the two backgrounds as Venn diagrams
print("Venn diagrams for overall Differentially Expressed Ubiquitinated Proteins (DEUs) overlap:")
grid.arrange(
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_Ubi_DE$DelC,    "8330" = list_8330_Ubi_DE$DelC)), quantities = TRUE, main = "DelC"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_Ubi_DE$DupC,    "8330" = list_8330_Ubi_DE$DupC)), quantities = TRUE, main = "DupC"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_Ubi_DE$HetDel,  "8330" = list_8330_Ubi_DE$HetDel)), quantities = TRUE, main = "HetDel"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_Ubi_DE$HomoDel, "8330" = list_8330_Ubi_DE$HomoDel)), quantities = TRUE, main = "HomoDel"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_Ubi_DE$PWSTI,   "8330" = list_8330_Ubi_DE$PWSTI)), quantities = TRUE, main = "PWSTI"),
  plot(euler(list("MGH" = list_MGH_Ubi_DE$PWSTII,  "8330" = list_8330_Ubi_DE$PWSTII)), quantities = TRUE, main = "PWSTII"),
  nrow=2,
  top = "Overlap of all Differentially Expressed Proteins (MGH vs 8330)"
)

# Step 2.3: Calculate and store the list of overlapping DEPs
list_Ubi_DE_overlap <- list(
  "overlap_DEU_DelC"    = intersect(list_MGH_Ubi_DE$DelC,    list_8330_Ubi_DE$DelC),
  "overlap_DEU_DupC"    = intersect(list_MGH_Ubi_DE$DupC,    list_8330_Ubi_DE$DupC),
  "overlap_DEU_HomoDel" = intersect(list_MGH_Ubi_DE$HomoDel, list_8330_Ubi_DE$HomoDel),
  "overlap_DEU_PWSTI"   = intersect(list_MGH_Ubi_DE$PWSTI,   list_8330_Ubi_DE$PWSTI),
  "overlap_DEU_PWSTII"  = intersect(list_MGH_Ubi_DE$PWSTII,  list_8330_Ubi_DE$PWSTII)
)

# Step 2.4: Count the number of overlapping DEPs for each condition
print("Number of overlapping DEPs for each condition:")
print(lapply(list_Ubi_DE_overlap, length))

```

4.4.1 Venn diagram overlap but keeping up- and downregulated DEGs/DEPs/DEUs separate

```{r}
library(eulerr)
library(gridExtra)

# ==============================================================================
# --- Helper Function for Styling ---
# ==============================================================================
# Colors: MGH Unique (#ECECEC), 8330 Unique (#B8B8B8), Overlap (#D9D9D9)
plot_custom_venn <- function(set_mgh, set_8330, plot_title) {
  
  fit <- euler(list("MGH" = set_mgh, "8330" = set_8330))
  
  plot(fit,
       quantities = TRUE,
       main = plot_title,
       fills = c("#ECECEC", "#B8B8B8", "#D9D9D9"), 
       edges = FALSE)
}
```

4.5.1 Statistical testing of venn diagram overlap: DEGs / DEPs / DEUs

```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# --- Helper Function for Hypergeometric Test ---
# ==============================================================================
# This function applies exactly the same logic as your previous code
calc_overlap_pvalues <- function(list_MGH, list_8330, background_N, label) {
  
  print(paste("--- P-values for:", label, "---"))
  
  # Get common names to compare (e.g., RNA_DelC_up, etc.)
  common_keys <- intersect(names(list_MGH), names(list_8330))
  
  for (key in common_keys) {
    # Extract the specific gene lists
    genes_MGH <- list_MGH[[key]]
    genes_8330 <- list_8330[[key]]
    
    # Calculate overlap
    overlap_count <- length(intersect(genes_MGH, genes_8330))
    
    # Perform Hypergeometric Test (Exact same parameters as your previous code)
    p_val <- phyper(
      q = overlap_count - 1,                      # overlap - 1
      m = length(genes_8330),                     # Size of List B (Successes)
      n = background_N - length(genes_8330),      # Universe - Size of List B (Failures)
      k = length(genes_MGH),                      # Size of List A (Draws)
      lower.tail = FALSE
    )
    
    # Format and Print
    significance <- ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "")
    print(paste0(key, ": p = ", format(p_val, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3), " ", significance))
  }
  cat("\n")
}

# ==============================================================================
# --- 1. RNA Analysis (Up & Down) ---
# ==============================================================================

N_genes <- nrow(DEG_list_MGH[[1]])  

calc_overlap_pvalues(list_MGH_RNA_up,   list_8330_RNA_up,   N_genes, "RNA Up-Regulated")
calc_overlap_pvalues(list_MGH_RNA_down, list_8330_RNA_down, N_genes, "RNA Down-Regulated")


# ==============================================================================
# --- 2. Protein Analysis (Up & Down) ---
# ==============================================================================


N_proteins <- nrow(dep_MGH_results_new) 

calc_overlap_pvalues(list_MGH_Protein_up,   list_8330_Protein_up,   N_proteins, "Protein Up-Regulated")
calc_overlap_pvalues(list_MGH_Protein_down, list_8330_Protein_down, N_proteins, "Protein Down-Regulated")


# ==============================================================================
# --- 3. Ubiquitin Analysis (Up & Down) ---
# ==============================================================================

N_ubi_proteins <- nrow(dep_ubi_MGH_new_results)

calc_overlap_pvalues(list_MGH_new_Ubi_up,   list_8330_new_Ubi_up,   N_ubi_proteins, "Ubiquitin Up-Regulated")
calc_overlap_pvalues(list_MGH_new_Ubi_down, list_8330_new_Ubi_down, N_ubi_proteins, "Ubiquitin Down-Regulated")
```

4.5.2 Statistical testing of venn diagram overlap: GO terms

```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# --- 1. Calculate the Exact GO Term Universe Size ---
# ==============================================================================

# We extract all GO IDs associated with human genes from the database you used.
# Since you used ont = "all", we count all unique GO IDs in org.Hs.eg.db.

all_GO_keys <- keys(org.Hs.eg.db, keytype = "GO")
N_GO_universe <- length(unique(all_GO_keys))

print(paste("The calculated background universe size is:", N_GO_universe, "unique GO terms."))
# Note: This is usually between 18,000 and 23,000 depending on the database version.


# ==============================================================================
# --- 2. Helper Function: Hypergeometric Test for GO Terms ---
# ==============================================================================
calc_GO_overlap_pvalues <- function(list_MGH, list_8330, background_N, label) {
  
  print(paste("--- P-values for:", label, "---"))
  
  # Get common names (e.g., RNA_DelC_up, etc.)
  common_keys <- intersect(names(list_MGH), names(list_8330))
  
  for (key in common_keys) {
    # Extract the GO term lists
    terms_MGH <- list_MGH[[key]]
    terms_8330 <- list_8330[[key]]
    
    # Calculate overlap
    overlap_count <- length(intersect(terms_MGH, terms_8330))
    
    # Perform Hypergeometric Test
    # q: overlap - 1 (because lower.tail = FALSE looks for P(X > x), we want P(X >= x))
    # m: Size of List 8330 (Successes in urn)
    # n: Universe - Size of List 8330 (Failures in urn)
    # k: Size of List MGH (Number of draws)
    
    p_val <- phyper(
      q = overlap_count - 1,                      
      m = length(terms_8330),                     
      n = background_N - length(terms_8330),      
      k = length(terms_MGH),                      
      lower.tail = FALSE
    )
    
    # Format and Print
    significance <- ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***", 
                    ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**", 
                    ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "")))
                    
    print(paste0(key, ": Overlap=", overlap_count, ", p=", format(p_val, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3), " ", significance))
  }
  cat("\n")
}

# ==============================================================================
# --- 3. Execute Statistics for RNA, Protein, and Ubiquitin ---
# ==============================================================================

# --- A. RNA GO Term Analysis ---
calc_GO_overlap_pvalues(GO_list_MGH_RNA_up_terms,   GO_list_8330_RNA_up_terms,   N_GO_universe, "RNA UP GO Terms")
calc_GO_overlap_pvalues(GO_list_MGH_RNA_down_terms, GO_list_8330_RNA_down_terms, N_GO_universe, "RNA DOWN GO Terms")


# --- B. Protein GO Term Analysis ---
calc_GO_overlap_pvalues(GO_list_MGH_Protein_up_terms,   GO_list_8330_Protein_up_terms,   N_GO_universe, "Protein UP GO Terms")
calc_GO_overlap_pvalues(GO_list_MGH_Protein_down_terms, GO_list_8330_Protein_down_terms, N_GO_universe, "Protein DOWN GO Terms")


# --- C. Ubiquitin GO Term Analysis ---
calc_GO_overlap_pvalues(GO_list_MGH_Ubi_up_terms,   GO_list_8330_Ubi_up_terms,   N_GO_universe, "Ubiquitin UP GO Terms")
calc_GO_overlap_pvalues(GO_list_MGH_Ubi_down_terms, GO_list_8330_Ubi_down_terms, N_GO_universe, "Ubiquitin DOWN GO Terms")
```

4.6 "Staircase Plots"

```{r}

# --- Part 1: Overlap Table for DEGs (common to both backgrounds) --- 

if (exists("list_RNA_DE_overlap") && length(list_RNA_DE_overlap) > 0) { 
  message("Generating overlap table for DEGs...") 

  # Get original and shortened condition names 
  original_rna_condition_names <- names(list_RNA_DE_overlap) 
  short_rna_condition_names <- gsub("overlap_DEG_", "", original_rna_condition_names) 
  num_rna_conditions <- length(short_rna_condition_names) 

  # Initialize an empty matrix 
  rna_overlap_matrix <- matrix( 
    0, 
    nrow = num_rna_conditions, 
    ncol = num_rna_conditions, 
    dimnames = list(short_rna_condition_names, short_rna_condition_names) 
  ) 

  # Populate the matrix with intersection counts 
  for (i in 1:num_rna_conditions) { 
    for (j in 1:num_rna_conditions) { 
      set_i <- list_RNA_DE_overlap[[original_rna_condition_names[i]]] 
      set_j <- list_RNA_DE_overlap[[original_rna_condition_names[j]]] 
      rna_overlap_matrix[i, j] <- length(intersect(set_i, set_j)) 
    } 
  } 

  print("Overlap Table for DEGs (genes common to MGH & 8330 backgrounds):") 
  print(rna_overlap_matrix) 

} else { 
  warning("list_RNA_DE_overlap is not defined or is empty. Skipping DEG overlap table.") 
} 

# --- Part 2: Overlap Table for DEPs (common to both backgrounds) --- 

if (exists("list_Protein_DE_overlap") && length(list_Protein_DE_overlap) > 0) { 
  message("\nGenerating overlap table for DEPs...") 

  # Get original and shortened condition names 
  original_protein_condition_names <- names(list_Protein_DE_overlap) 
  short_protein_condition_names <- gsub("overlap_DEP_", "", original_protein_condition_names) 
  num_protein_conditions <- length(short_protein_condition_names) 

  # Initialize an empty matrix 
  protein_overlap_matrix <- matrix( 
    0, 
    nrow = num_protein_conditions, 
    ncol = num_protein_conditions, 
    dimnames = list(short_protein_condition_names, short_protein_condition_names) 
  ) 

  # Populate the matrix with intersection counts 
  for (i in 1:num_protein_conditions) { 
    for (j in 1:num_protein_conditions) { 
      set_i <- list_Protein_DE_overlap[[original_protein_condition_names[i]]] 
      set_j <- list_Protein_DE_overlap[[original_protein_condition_names[j]]] 
      protein_overlap_matrix[i, j] <- length(intersect(set_i, set_j)) 
    } 
  } 

  print("Overlap Table for DEPs (proteins common to MGH & 8330 backgrounds):") 
  print(protein_overlap_matrix) 

} else { 
  warning("list_Protein_DE_overlap is not defined or is empty. Skipping DEP overlap table.") 
} 


# --- Part 3: Overlap Table for DEUs (common to both backgrounds) --- 

if (exists("list_Ubi_DE_overlap") && length(list_Ubi_DE_overlap) > 0) { 
  message("\nGenerating overlap table for DEUs...") 

  # Get original and shortened condition names 
  original_protein_condition_names <- names(list_Ubi_DE_overlap) 
  short_protein_condition_names <- gsub("overlap_DEU_", "", original_protein_condition_names) 
  num_protein_conditions <- length(short_protein_condition_names) 

  # Initialize an empty matrix 
  Ubi_overlap_matrix <- matrix( 
    0, 
    nrow = num_protein_conditions, 
    ncol = num_protein_conditions, 
    dimnames = list(short_protein_condition_names, short_protein_condition_names) 
  ) 

  # Populate the matrix with intersection counts 
  for (i in 1:num_protein_conditions) { 
    for (j in 1:num_protein_conditions) { 
      set_i <- list_Ubi_DE_overlap[[original_protein_condition_names[i]]] 
      set_j <- list_Ubi_DE_overlap[[original_protein_condition_names[j]]] 
      Ubi_overlap_matrix[i, j] <- length(intersect(set_i, set_j)) 
    } 
  } 

  print("Overlap Table for DEUs (proteins common to MGH & 8330 backgrounds):") 
  print(Ubi_overlap_matrix) 

} else { 
  warning("list_Ubi_DE_overlap is not defined or is empty. Skipping DEP overlap table.") 
} 


# --- Part 4: Optimized Heatmap for DEG Overlaps (Oranges, Black Text, No Grid) --- 

if (exists("rna_overlap_matrix") && is.matrix(rna_overlap_matrix)) { 
  message("Generating optimized heatmap for DEG overlaps with Oranges palette...") 

  rna_heatmap_colormatrix <- rna_overlap_matrix 
  rna_heatmap_colormatrix[upper.tri(rna_heatmap_colormatrix)] <- NA 

  rna_display_numbers <- ifelse( 
    is.na(rna_heatmap_colormatrix), 
    "", 
    formatC(rna_heatmap_colormatrix, format = "d") 
  ) 

  # Define the "Oranges" color palette, avoiding the darkest shade for readability
  oranges_palette_light <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(n = 9, name = "OrRd")[1:6])(100) 

  pheatmap( 
    rna_heatmap_colormatrix, 
    display_numbers = rna_display_numbers, 
    na_col = "white", 
    cluster_rows = FALSE, 
    cluster_cols = FALSE, 
    main = "DEG Overlaps Between Conditions (Lower Triangle)", 
    fontsize_number = 16, 
    fontsize = 16, 
    legend = TRUE, 
    color = oranges_palette_light,  # Use the light Oranges palette
    border_color = NA,              # Remove the grid
    number_color = "black",          # Ensure numbers are black
    angle_col = "0" 
 ) 
} else { 
  warning("rna_overlap_matrix is not defined or is not a matrix. Skipping DEG heatmap.") 
} 

# --- Part 5: Optimized Heatmap for DEP Overlaps (Oranges, Black Text, No Grid) --- 

if (exists("protein_overlap_matrix") && is.matrix(protein_overlap_matrix)) { 
  message("\nGenerating optimized heatmap for DEP overlaps with Oranges palette...") 

  protein_heatmap_colormatrix <- protein_overlap_matrix 
  protein_heatmap_colormatrix[upper.tri(protein_heatmap_colormatrix)] <- NA 

  protein_display_numbers <- ifelse( 
    is.na(protein_heatmap_colormatrix), 
    "", 
    formatC(protein_heatmap_colormatrix, format = "d") 
  ) 

  # Define the "Oranges" color palette, avoiding the darkest shade
  oranges_palette_light <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(n = 9, name = "OrRd")[1:6])(100) 

  pheatmap( 
    protein_heatmap_colormatrix, 
    display_numbers = protein_display_numbers, 
    na_col = "white", 
    cluster_rows = FALSE, 
    cluster_cols = FALSE, 
    main = "DEP Overlaps Between Conditions (Lower Triangle)", 
    fontsize_number = 16, 
    fontsize = 16, 
    legend = TRUE, 
    color = oranges_palette_light, # Use the light Oranges palette
    border_color = NA,             # Remove the grid
    number_color = "black",         # Ensure numbers are black
    angle_col = "0" 
    ) 
} else { 
  warning("protein_overlap_matrix is not defined or is not a matrix. Skipping DEP heatmap.") 
} 




# --- Part 6: Optimized Heatmap for DEU Overlaps (Oranges, Black Text, No Grid) --- 

if (exists("Ubi_overlap_matrix") && is.matrix(Ubi_overlap_matrix)) { 
  message("\nGenerating optimized heatmap for DEU overlaps with Oranges palette...") 

  Ubi_heatmap_colormatrix <- Ubi_overlap_matrix 
  Ubi_heatmap_colormatrix[upper.tri(Ubi_heatmap_colormatrix)] <- NA 

  Ubi_display_numbers <- ifelse( 
    is.na(Ubi_heatmap_colormatrix), 
    "", 
    formatC(Ubi_heatmap_colormatrix, format = "d") 
  ) 

  # Define the "Oranges" color palette, avoiding the darkest shade
  oranges_palette_light <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(n = 9, name = "OrRd")[1:6])(100) 

  pheatmap( 
    Ubi_heatmap_colormatrix, 
    display_numbers = Ubi_display_numbers, 
    na_col = "white", 
    cluster_rows = FALSE, 
    cluster_cols = FALSE, 
    main = "DEU Overlaps Between Conditions (Lower Triangle)", 
    fontsize_number = 16,
    fontsize = 16, 
    legend = TRUE, 
    color = oranges_palette_light, # Use the light Oranges palette
    border_color = NA,             # Remove the grid
    number_color = "black",         # Ensure numbers are black
    angle_col = "0" 
  ) 
} else { 
  warning("Ubi_overlap_matrix is not defined or is not a matrix. Skipping DEU heatmap.") 
}
```

5.1.1 Intersection of DEGs across mutants (not-exclusive)

```{r}
# --- 1. DOWN-REGULATED INTERSECTION ---

# Combine the lists from MGH and 8330 backgrounds
# We unlist/combine the lists so we have one list containing all 12 comparisons (6 mutants * 2 backgrounds)
all_down_lists_RNA <- c(list_MGH_RNA_down, list_8330_RNA_down)

# Check how many lists we are intersecting (Should be 12 if all mutants are present in both)
message(paste("Intersecting", length(all_down_lists_RNA), "downregulated protein lists..."))

# Calculate the strict intersection (Protein must be in ALL lists)
intersection_RNA_down <- Reduce(intersect, all_down_lists_RNA)

# Print results
print("--- RNAs Downregulated in ALL Genotypes and Backgrounds ---")
if(length(intersection_RNA_down) > 0) {
  print(intersection_RNA_down)
} else {
  message("No RNAs found that are downregulated in absolutely every condition.")
}

# Create Data Frame
intersection_RNA_down_df <- data.frame(RNA = intersection_RNA_down)


# --- 2. UP-REGULATED INTERSECTION ---

# Combine the lists from MGH and 8330 backgrounds
all_up_lists_RNA <- c(list_MGH_RNA_up, list_8330_RNA_up)

# Check how many lists we are intersecting
message(paste("\nIntersecting", length(all_up_lists_RNA), "upregulated protein lists..."))

# Calculate the strict intersection
intersection_RNA_up <- Reduce(intersect, all_up_lists_RNA)

# Print results
print("--- RNAs Upregulated in ALL Genotypes and Backgrounds ---")
if(length(intersection_RNA_up) > 0) {
  options(max.print = 10000)
  print(intersection_RNA_up)
} else {
  message("No proteins found that are upregulated in absolutely every condition.")
}

# Create Data Frame
intersection_RNA_up_df <- data.frame(RNA = intersection_RNA_up)

```

5.2 Dot plot for HP enrichment in downregulated proteins

```{r}
# Run g:Profiler enrichment analysis
gostres_all_protein_down <- gost(
  query = intersection_proteins_down, 
  organism = "hsapiens", 
  ordered_query = FALSE, 
  multi_query = FALSE, 
  significant = TRUE, 
  exclude_iea = FALSE, 
  measure_underrepresentation = FALSE, 
  evcodes = FALSE, 
  user_threshold = 0.05, 
  correction_method = "fdr", 
  domain_scope = "annotated", 
  custom_bg = NULL, 
  numeric_ns = "", 
  sources = c("HP"), 
  as_short_link = FALSE, 
  highlight = TRUE
)

# Extract enrichment results and ensure it's a data frame
gost_results <- gostres_all_protein_down$result

# Convert to data frame if needed
if (!inherits(gost_results, "data.frame")) {
  gost_results <- as.data.frame(gost_results)
}

# Check if results exist
if (is.null(gost_results) || nrow(gost_results) == 0) {
  stop("No significant terms found in enrichment analysis.")
}

# Prepare data for dot plot
gost_plot_data <- gost_results %>%
  dplyr::select(term_name, p_value, intersection_size) %>%
  # Rename p_value to adj_p_value for clarity
  dplyr::rename(adj_p_value = p_value) %>%
  # Calculate the -log10 of the adjusted p-value
  dplyr::mutate(log_adj_p_value = -log10(adj_p_value)) %>%
  # Arrange by the adjusted p-value to get the most significant terms
  dplyr::arrange(adj_p_value) %>%
  # Select the top 15 terms
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 15)


ggplot(gost_plot_data, aes(x = log_adj_p_value, y = reorder(term_name, log_adj_p_value), size = intersection_size, color = adj_p_value)) +
  geom_point() +
  # Set the color gradient from low to high
  scale_color_gradient(low = "firebrick", high = "lightblue") +
  labs(
    title = "Human Phenotypes in all downregulated proteins",
    x = "-log10(Adjusted p-value)", # Updated x-axis label
    y = "Enriched HP Terms",
    size = "Gene Count",
    color = "Adjusted p-value" # Updated legend title for color
  )

```
